2604.28138.title: Crab: A Semantics-Aware Checkpoint/Restore Runtime for Agent Sandboxes
2604.28138.paper_summary: Autonomous agents act through sandboxed containers and microVMs whose state spans filesystems, processes, and runtime artifacts. Checkpoint and restore (C/R) of this state is needed for fault tolerance, spot execution, RL rollout branching, and safe rollback-yet existing approaches fall into two extremes: application-level recovery preserves chat history but misses OS-side effects, while full per-turn checkpointing is correct but too expensive under dense co-location. The root cause is an agent-OS semantic gap: agent frameworks see tool calls but not their OS effects; the OS sees state changes but lacks turn-level context to judge recovery relevance. This gap hides massive sparsity: over 75% of agent turns produce no recovery-relevant state, so most checkpoints are unnecessary. Crab (Checkpoint-and-Restore for Agent SandBoxes) is a transparent host-side runtime that bridges this gap without modifying agents or C/R backends. An eBPF-based inspector classifies each turn's OS-visible effects to decide checkpoint granularity; a coordinator aligns checkpoints with turn boundaries and overlaps C/R with LLM wait time; and a host-scoped engine schedules checkpoint traffic across co-located sandboxes. On shell-intensive and code-repair workloads, Crab raises recovery correctness from 8% (chat-only) to 100%, cuts checkpoint traffic by up to 87%, and stays within 1.9% of fault-free execution time.
2604.28138.paper_summary_zh: 自主代理透過沙盒容器和微虛擬機運作，其狀態跨越檔案系統、進程和運行時產物。<lb/>為了容錯、即時執行、強化學習展開分支和安全回滾，需要對此狀態進行檢查點和恢復（C/R）—然而現有的方法陷入了兩個極端：應用層恢復保留了聊天歷史，但忽略了操作系統的副作用，而每回合的完整檢查點雖然正確，但在密集共置下成本過高。<lb/>根本原因在於代理與操作系統之間的語義差距：代理框架看到工具調用，但看不到它們的操作系統影響；操作系統看到狀態變化，但缺乏回合級上下文來判斷恢復的相關性。<lb/>這一差距隱藏了巨大的稀疏性：超過75%的代理回合不產生任何與恢復相關的狀態，因此大多數檢查點都是不必要的。<lb/>Crab（代理沙盒的檢查點與恢復）是一個透明的主機端運行時，無需修改代理或C/R後端即可彌合這一差距。<lb/>基於eBPF的檢查器對每個回合的操作系統可見影響進行分類，以決定檢查點的粒度；協調器將檢查點與回合邊界對齊，並將C/R與LLM等待時間重疊；而主機範圍的引擎則在共置的沙盒之間調度檢查點流量。<lb/>在以shell為重的和代碼修復的工作負載中，Crab將恢復正確性從8%（僅聊天）提升至100%，將檢查點流量減少高達87%，並保持在故障無誤執行時間的1.9%內。
2604.28138.author: Tianyuan Wu et.al.
2604.28138.authors: Tianyuan Wu, Chaokun Chang, Lunxi Cao, Wei Gao, Wei Wang
